metadata.title:
EARLING AND ELLIOTT CON-
FERENCE HERE INDICATES
COMBINATION OF THREE
BIG LINES TO CONTROL To-
CAL SITUATION.

pages.raw_text:
With Pres. A. J. Earling, of the
Milwaukee, and Pres. Howard Ell
lott, of the Northern Pacific, trav-
cling around the country together
and holding conferences in import
ant points like Spokane, it looks
like the Milwaukee extension west
is largely another enterprise of the
Hill system.


At least, no very fierce competi-
ton is foreshadowed by the at
titudes of the two magnates. 1t is
not hard to imagine the master
hand of Jim Hill guiding the move
ments of both.


Both Mr.. Earling and Mr.. Elliott
left early last evening for Butte on
Mr.. Elliott's special train, after
spending the day here in going
over the local situation. Nothing
is given out as to the object of
their mission. Both have been
making a thorough inspection OF
the coast situation and comparing
notes along the line.


The Milwaukee will shortly be
connected with the Northern Pa.
cific at Lombard, Mont, about 300
miles east of Spokane, and the re
suit of the inspection and confer
ences may be a traffic agreement
whereby the Milwaukee will come
into Spokane over the Northern
